2025-26 Evansville Purple Aces Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 7-25 (3-17, 11th in MVC MBB)

Coach: David Ragland

PS/G: 67.0 (347th of 365)

PA/G: 76.5 (252nd of 365)

SRS: -9.23 (277th of 365)

SOS: 3.27 (103rd of 365)

ORtg: 98.5 (348th of 365)

DRtg: 112.4 (313th of 365)
